data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding user input sanitization.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where all user input is sanitized or escaped. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or results that confirm whether the input sanitization is implemented or functioning as expected. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence of the sanitization process, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of input sanitization checks or results.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add input sanitization validation tests
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define tests that explicitly verify the sanitization of user inputs.
